channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Blue Alert sa Metro Manila dahil sa Pagdating ng Typhoon Inday
item.description: Ang Metro Manila ay nasa Blue Alert status dahil sa posibleng epekto ng Typhoon Inday, ayon sa Office of the Civil Defense (OCD). Ang OCD ay nagsimula na sa virtual emergency operation center para mag...

item.title: Blue Jays Dominate Giants with 10-0 Win, Cease Nears No-Hitter
item.description: Toronto Blue Jays secured a commanding 10-0 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Dylan Cease delivering eight no-hit innings before allowing a single to Heliot Ramos in the ninth. Cease (6-4) s...

item.title: Mervyn Naidoo Recognized for Excellence in Hard News Reporting at 2026 Sikuvile Awards
item.description: Mervyn Naidoo, the Daily News' Content Manager, has been honoured with the 2026 Standard Bank Sikuvile Journalism Award in the 'Hard News' category. The prestigious event, co-hosted by SANEF and Stand...

item.title: Legal Practice Council Seeks to Strike Busisiwe Mkhwebane Off Advocates’ Roll Over Alleged Misconduct
item.description: The South African Legal Practice Council has formally requested the Pretoria High Court to remove former public protector and politician Busisiwe Mkhwebane from the advocates' roll, citing severe char...

item.title: Queensland Police Conduct Welfare Checks After Triple Zero Network Outage
item.description: Queensland police are carrying out urgent welfare checks on over a dozen individuals whose emergency calls failed during a nationwide telecommunications outage. The incident, which began around 4am on...

item.title: Fact-Check: Trump's $19.2 Trillion Investment Claim Under Scrutiny
item.description: Political analysts have fact-checked President Donald Trump's assertion that the United States attracted $19.2 trillion in investments during his second term to build plants and equipment nationwide. ...

item.title: Gas supply disruption in Punjab due to force majeure
item.description: Sui Northern Gas Pipelines Ltd (SNGPL) has declared force majeure due to renewed tensions around the Strait of Hormuz, leading to a three-week halt in regasified liquefied natural gas (RLNG) supply. T...

item.title: Maine Senate race turmoil as Platner faces sexual assault allegations and withdraws from contest
item.description: Former Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner faced intense scrutiny after a woman alleged he had forced himself into her home uninvited. The accusation, corroborated by friends and a therapist, led to...

item.title: Choosing the Right Senior Maths Subject: A Guide for Students
item.description: Selecting the appropriate senior maths subject is crucial for students' academic and career pathways. The article highlights that choosing a subject that is too difficult can lead to anxiety and under...

item.title: Pakistan faces economic challenges due to potential US-Iran conflict escalation
item.description: The Economic Affairs Division (EAD) has warned that a renewed escalation between the US and Iran could severely impact Pakistan's economy through increased energy costs, inflation, higher external fin...

item.title: China's Agricultural Revolution: Drones and IoT Transform Farming Efficiency and Quality
item.description: The article highlights how drones and Internet of Things (IoT) technology are revolutionising agriculture in China. Unmanned Autonomous Vehicles (UAVs) are being used extensively to optimise farming p...

item.title: Prime Volleyball League gains FIVB recognition for Season 5 starting November 30
item.description: The Prime Volleyball League (PVL) has received official recognition from the Fédération Internationale de Volleyball (FIVB), marking it as India's first division professional volleyball league. This r...

item.title: Reform UK's Internal Struggles as Nigel Farage's Resignation Sparks Political Turmoil
item.description: The article details the internal chaos within Reform UK following Nigel Farage's resignation, highlighting the aggressive tactics of Zia Yusuf as he attempts to salvage the party's reputation. Farage'...

item.title: Evaluating the Impact of Banning Cellphones in Schools on Student Performance
item.description: The article discusses the implementation of cellphone bans in Philippine schools, citing a DepEd order and Senate Bill No. 627. It highlights mixed evidence on the effectiveness of such bans, referenc...

item.title: NHL trade drama: Flyers' $18M offer for Leo Carlsson sparks debate over team's cap space
item.description: The article discusses the NHL's ongoing trade drama involving the Philadelphia Flyers' $18 million per-year offer for Anaheim Ducks' restricted free agent Leo Carlsson. Florida Panthers star Brady Tka...

item.title: Nigeria and Liberia Commit to Enhanced Cooperation and Economic Partnership
item.description: The Nigerian government has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening bilateral relations with Liberia through enhanced political consultations, trade, investment, youth development, and regional coo...

item.title: Manhattan High-Rise Building Faces Structural Challenges After Column Collapse
item.description: A high-rise building in Manhattan, formerly the Pfizer headquarters, faced structural instability after steel columns buckled, prompting an emergency evacuation and ongoing stabilization efforts. The ...

item.title: Trump's ICE Nomination Sparks Concern Over Leadership Qualifications
item.description: President Donald Trump's recent nomination of Lance Schroyer to lead Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has drawn criticism from legal experts, who argue the choice reflects a shift toward loya...

item.title: Kitchener Community Grieves After Local Radio Station Closes
item.description: The Kitchener community is coming to terms with the closure of a long-standing local radio station, an event that has sparked widespread mourning and reflection. The article highlights how residents h...

item.title: European Airlines Halt Flights to Iran, Iraq, and Lebanon Due to Regional Security Concerns
item.description: European airlines have suspended flights to Iran, Iraq, and Lebanon due to escalating security concerns and regional tensions in the Middle East. The decision affects multiple carriers operating route...
